settings.name: Tara M.
settings.title: Tastes like actual lollies
settings.body: I cannot believe these are sugar free. The mango is unreal and I get 20g of protein - my 3pm snack is sorted for good.

settings.name: Josh R.
settings.title: Post-gym go-to
settings.body: Chewy, not chalky. So much nicer than choking down another shake. The bag never lasts long in my house.

settings.name: Priya K.
settings.title: No bloat, no crash
settings.body: Plant protein my stomach actually likes. Sweet without the sugar high afterwards. Already on my second order.

settings.name: Dan W.
settings.title: Great - bring on watermelon
settings.body: Mango is delicious. Only knocking a star because I want the other flavours yesterday. Hurry up!

settings.title: Sour Watermelon
settings.description: Tangy-sweet watermelon with a proper sour kick.

settings.title: Blueberry
settings.description: Juicy wild blueberry, deep, mellow and moreish.

settings.title: Mango Madness · Travel
settings.description: Same Mango Madness, in a grab-and-go 90g pack.

settings.description_override: Tropical mango wrapped in a pillowy plant-protein gummy. 20g of pea & rice protein per serving, zero added sugar, and a real hit of sunshine in every chew.
settings.variant_note: $25.00 per bag - upgrade to a multipack & save up to 30%
settings.info_1_text: Organic pea & rice protein, allulose, stevia & real fruit. 100% plant based, gluten free, no artificial colours.
